news.title: Vodafone Idea gains users after a 5-year period.
news.summary: Vodafone Idea gains users after a 5-year period.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea added 21,927 users in February, marking its first user gain in 5 years, raising its base to 198.4M.
The turnaround is driven by network expansion, government AGR relief, and plans for ₹25K crore funding for capex.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea added 21,927 users in February, marking its first user gain in 5 years, raising its base to 198.4M.
The turnaround is driven by network expansion, government AGR relief, and plans for ₹25K crore funding for capex.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea upgrades its transport network using Ciena's WL6e solution on the 6500 platform.
The modernization aims to help Vodafone Idea tap new business opportunities in India.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea upgrades its transport network using Ciena's WL6e solution on the 6500 platform.
The modernization aims to help Vodafone Idea tap new business opportunities in India.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea partners with Ericsson, Nokia, and Samsung to expand 5G to 90 cities by May 2026.
The nationwide 5G expansion aligns with Vodafone Idea's strategic growth plans in India.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea partners with Ericsson, Nokia, and Samsung to expand 5G to 90 cities by May 2026.
The nationwide 5G expansion aligns with Vodafone Idea's strategic growth plans in India.

news.title:
Supreme Court allows reconsideration of AGR dues for Vodafone Idea.
AGR order clarified to apply only to Vodafone Idea, reshaping its dues outlook.
news.summary:
Supreme Court allows reconsideration of AGR dues for Vodafone Idea.
AGR order clarified to apply only to Vodafone Idea, reshaping its dues outlook.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.
Vodafone Idea fell 2%, Filatex plunged 6%, while Ola Electric rose 6% amid its EndICEAge campaign.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.
Vodafone Idea fell 2%, Filatex plunged 6%, while Ola Electric rose 6% amid its EndICEAge campaign.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea gains relief with AGR liabilities frozen at Rs 87,695 cr and 5-year repayment deferment.
ARPU rose 7.3% YoY; DoT considers Rs 27,000 cr AGR dues cut, boosting investor confidence in turnaround.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea gains relief with AGR liabilities frozen at Rs 87,695 cr and 5-year repayment deferment.
ARPU rose 7.3% YoY; DoT considers Rs 27,000 cr AGR dues cut, boosting investor confidence in turnaround.

news.title:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.
news.summary:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.

news.title: Vodafone Idea and BSNL initiate discussions on sharing telecom infrastructure.
news.summary: Vodafone Idea and BSNL initiate discussions on sharing telecom infrastructure.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 5.6% to ₹9.44 after slower subscriber attrition in Jan '26.
Vodafone Idea's user base fell by 4.1L in Jan, improving from Dec's 9.4L loss.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 5.6% to ₹9.44 after slower subscriber attrition in Jan '26.
Vodafone Idea's user base fell by 4.1L in Jan, improving from Dec's 9.4L loss.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea Ltd. surged 5.37%, outperforming the Telecom sector by 3.66 percentage points.
The sharp rally raises questions on whether it's a recovery or a tactical bounce.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea Ltd. surged 5.37%, outperforming the Telecom sector by 3.66 percentage points.
The sharp rally raises questions on whether it's a recovery or a tactical bounce.

news.title:
Centre has no plans to dilute its 49% stake in Vodafone Idea.
Telecom market in India is growing and delivering better value globally.
news.summary:
Centre has no plans to dilute its 49% stake in Vodafone Idea.
Telecom market in India is growing and delivering better value globally.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, HDFC Bank, JP Power, Eternal among most traded stocks on NSE.
Vodafone Idea fell 4%, HDFC Bank hit 52-wk low, JP Power gained 2%, Eternal dropped 5%.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, HDFC Bank, JP Power, Eternal among most traded stocks on NSE.
Vodafone Idea fell 4%, HDFC Bank hit 52-wk low, JP Power gained 2%, Eternal dropped 5%.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea faces Rs. 21.6 crore penalty for alleged tax non-payment under reverse charge for 2018-20.
The company plans to contest the demand, encompassing tax, interest, and penalty.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea faces Rs. 21.6 crore penalty for alleged tax non-payment under reverse charge for 2018-20.
The company plans to contest the demand, encompassing tax, interest, and penalty.

news.title:
JSW Group considers investing in Vodafone Idea as govt seeks strong investors.
Govt aims to support the telecom operator through credible investments.
news.summary:
JSW Group considers investing in Vodafone Idea as govt seeks strong investors.
Govt aims to support the telecom operator through credible investments.

news.title:
JSW Group and ST Telemedia are in talks to acquire a stake in Vodafone Idea.
Both domestic and global investors are considering investments in Vodafone Idea.
news.summary:
JSW Group and ST Telemedia are in talks to acquire a stake in Vodafone Idea.
Both domestic and global investors are considering investments in Vodafone Idea.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea plans to meet institutional investors in Singapore and Hong Kong mid-March.
The meetings align with Vi's January plans to secure funding for enhancing customer experience.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea plans to meet institutional investors in Singapore and Hong Kong mid-March.
The meetings align with Vi's January plans to secure funding for enhancing customer experience.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea fell 4% post investor meeting plans; Jindal Saw dropped 3.5% after prior gains.
YES Bank declined 3% amid asset quality concerns; geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices weigh on markets.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea fell 4% post investor meeting plans; Jindal Saw dropped 3.5% after prior gains.
YES Bank declined 3% amid asset quality concerns; geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices weigh on markets.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea's AGR dues to reduce by 31%, cutting liabilities by ₹27,000Cr.
Panel reassessment leads to significant reduction in liabilities for Vodafone Idea.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea's AGR dues to reduce by 31%, cutting liabilities by ₹27,000Cr.
Panel reassessment leads to significant reduction in liabilities for Vodafone Idea.

news.title:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.
news.summary:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.
